title: IEEE 1901.2a Protocol Stack in IoT
description: A layered diagram showing how IEEE 1901.2a extends the IEEE 1901.2 standard to enable OFDM-based narrowband powerline communication for IoT applications.
relationships: IEEE 1901.2a provides the communication protocol stack that allows data from IoT Devices/Sensors to be transmitted over existing Powerline wiring to be monitored and managed by a Utility/Control Center.
